query:
SELECT t.sample_id as "sample_id!: i64",
                d.name as dimension,
                dv.value as "enum_value?: String",
                t.numeric_value,
                t.text_value
         FROM tags t
         JOIN dimensions d ON d.id = t.dimension_id
         LEFT JOIN dimension_values dv ON dv.id = t.value_id
         WHERE t.is_primary = 1
